name: topologicpy
description: TopologicPy skill: graph-based spatial modelling and analysis for AEC; convert IFC/building data to graph structures and prepare data for Graph ML.
author: AEC Agent Skills
capabilities: Convert IFC/topologies to graph structures using Graph.ByTopology and Graph.ByVerticesEdges
Transform building data formats into graph structures with node/edge attributes
Extract adjacency lists/matrices and compute shortest paths, MST, and centrality measures
Prepare graph data for Graph ML frameworks (DGL, PyG)
Export/serialize graph formats (CSV, JSON, Speckle, py2neo)
